allow: Bash(node -e "const ai = require\('ai'\); const result = Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(ai\); console.log\(result.filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('stream'\)\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const {streamText} = require\('ai'\); const {google} = require\('@ai-sdk/google'\); async function test\(\) { try { const r = await streamText\({model: google\('gemini-1.5-flash'\), prompt: 'hi'}\); console.log\(Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(r\)\)\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('error:', e.message\); } } test\(\)")

Bash(node -e "const {streamText} = require\('ai'\); const {google} = require\('@ai-sdk/google'\); async function test\(\) { try { const r = await streamText\({model: google\('gemini-1.5-flash'\), prompt: 'hi'}\); const proto = Object.getPrototypeOf\(r\); const names = []; let p = proto; while\(p\) { names.push\(...Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(p\)\); p = Object.getPrototypeOf\(p\); if\(p === Object.prototype\) break; } console.log\(names.filter\(n => n.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('response'\) || n.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('stream'\) || n.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('pipe'\)\)\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('error:', e.message\); } } test\(\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const d = fs.readFileSync\('./node_modules/@ai-sdk/react/dist/index.d.ts', 'utf8'\); const lines = d.split\('\\n'\); const idx = lines.findIndex\(l => l.includes\('UseChatHelpers'\)\); console.log\(lines.slice\(idx, idx+60\).join\('\\n'\)\)")
